REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION 7-9 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER TO THESE CAUSES OF ACTION AND IT APPEARS FROM THE OPPOSITION PAPERS ON FILE THAT PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THAT THERE ARE ONLY 6 CAUSES OF ACTION ASSERTED IN THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT. (OPPOSITION 1:6-9). DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1-3, 5 AND 6 IS OVERRULED. COMPLAINT ALLEGES FACTS REGARDING APPLICABILITY OF HBOR. CHALLENGING THE VERACITY OF THESE ALLEGATIONS IS NOT A PROPER FUNCTION OF THE DEMURRER. THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER DOCUMENTS ATTACHED TO THE MOVING PAPERS ON THE DEMURRER. DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO BE RE-ASSERTED ONLY IF PLAINTIFF MAY DO SO IN GOOD FAITH IN LIGHT OF SHEEN V. WELLS FARGO (2022) 12 CAL.5TH 905. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT TY INVESTMENT, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the causes of action 7-9 is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition to the demurrer to these causes of action and it appears from the opposition papers on file that Plaintiff believes that there are only 6 causes of action asserted in the operative complaint. (Opposition 1:6-9). Demurrer to causes of action 1-3, 5 and 6 is OVERRULED. Complaint alleges facts regarding applicability of HBOR. Challenging the veracity of these allegations is not a proper function of the demurrer. The Court will not consider documents attached to the moving papers on the demurrer.
Demurrer to the 4th causes of action for negligence is sustained with leave to amend to be re-asserted only if Plaintiff may do so in good faith in light of Sheen v. Wells Fargo (2022) 12 Cal.5th 905.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT TY INVESTMENT, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend. P appears to suggest that it was Plaintiff's intent to bring this action in her capacities as an individual and as trustee.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
